name: NORTHERN MINERALS & EXPLORATION LTD.
summary: Northern Minerals & Exploration Ltd. is a Nevada-incorporated emerging natural resource company engaged in oil and gas production in central Texas and gold and silver exploration in northern Nevada. It operates through subsidiaries including Kathis Energy LLC (Texas oil and gas drilling) and ENMEX Operations LLC (Mexico real estate development), though both subsidiaries report no operational activity to date.
